articles.title: FinOps AI governance demands new models and metrics
articles.description: FinOps AI governance requires new models, cross-functional collaboration and outcome-based metrics to move beyond cost management into business value.
articles.content: FinOps AI governance is being stress-tested as AI spending accelerates across enterprises. The familiar levers of cost optimization — tagging, rightsizing, reserved capacity — are proving insufficient against a cost model governed by tokens, opaque b... [2982 chars]

articles.title: Commerce AI for profit growth
articles.description: Fractal Analytics has introduced Cogentiq E-Commerce, an AI-native profit engine designed to optimize online sales for consumer products companies. Announced on June 11, 2026, the platform monitors over 70 marketplace signals to facilitate real-time decision-making across customer, media, and supply teams. Currently live on Amazon Marketplace, the tool reduces response time from days to minutes and enables rapid deployment via a marketplace API.

articles.title: Big Tech Is Borrowing Half A Trillion For AI, And Your Pension Is Probably Lending It
articles.description: The companies behind the artificial-intelligence boom have turned from the market's biggest savers into some of its biggest debtors, and a good deal of that borrowing is being quietly funded from the dullest, safest corner of ordinary retirement money.
articles.content: In February, for a yield only a little above what the British government pays, an investor could lend Alphabet money until the year 2126. Google's parent sold a 100-year sterling bond, the first century bond from a technology company since Motorola i... [8175 chars]
